outcome_record.event_name: UFC Fight Night — Weight Miss Case Study (Welterweight Bout)

prediction.pre_match_note: WEIGHT MISS DETECTED: Fighter A missed weight by 2.5 lbs. weight_miss_modifier x0.72 applied immediately. Reload analysis — original prediction superseded. Direction shifted to AWAY (opponent). Low confidence due to weight miss volatility.

calibration_flags.notes: CRITICAL VALIDATION: weight_miss_modifier x0.72 direction confirmed correct. Fighter who missed weight lost. This is the most important single MMA modifier calibration record in the library. Weight miss signal validated as reliable direction signal (opponent wins more often). Reload protocol confirmed correct.
